bugs.summary: The proposed patch removes `catalog` from accepted workflow top-level keys.
bugs.impact: Bundled artifact-graph workflows in this revision include catalog metadata; removing the allowed key makes valid bundled workflows fail public schema parsing.
acceptableFixes: Keep `catalog` in `TOP_LEVEL_KEYS` while catalog-bearing bundled specs exist.
Add a parser fixture covering bundled workflows with catalog metadata.
mustNotSay: Catalog removal is safe in this source revision.

mustAvoidClaims: Using prior A/B run notes as evidence.
Relying on git history instead of the sanitized workspace and proposed patch.

difficulty.rationale: Local schema key removal has broad fixture impact but is easy to spot.

approval.notes: Second-wave draft; validate/materialize only. Requires calibration and provider review before lock.
